mechanic.summary: A mission is NOT active the moment you take it. It comes with a RANDOMIZED objective; completing that objective activates the mission's ongoing effect.
mechanic.keyQuote: Mission objectives are randomized, and may include gaining time, earning End Reward Pulls, opening chests, getting Boons or Curses, or being offered a certain number of Beacons.
mechanic.greyRule: Only one Mission can be taken on at a time, and you will not be offered any Grey Beacons as long as one is already active. (So grey stays blocked until the active mission's objective is completed.)
mechanic.consequence: The objective is NOT a fixed property of the mission — the same mission rolls a different objective each pickup. It therefore cannot be pre-listed per mission; the player must input which objective they were given, and the advisor biases beacons toward completing it.
mechanic.confirmedBy: user, 2026-07-23 ("you don't instantly get the effect... you need to do something to activate it, such as open chest, get boons or curse")

resolved_2026_07_23.activationEqualsUnblock: Completing the objective activates the mission AND unblocks grey — ONE event. In the app: ticking the mission's 'done' box does both.
resolved_2026_07_23.noEffectBeforeActivation: A mission has NO effect until its objective is completed. So the advisor must NOT bias beacons toward an un-activated mission's archetype — before activation it should instead push the beacon that COMPLETES the objective.
resolved_2026_07_23.scalingIgnored: Objectives scale in quantity (e.g. open 3 chests early, more later) but we do not track the number — just recommend the objective's beacon/action until the user ticks it done.
resolved_2026_07_23.gainTimeIsPassive: The gain_time objective needs no special beacon — ordinary challenges already grant time, so it completes on its own. Do not push green for it.
resolved_2026_07_23.darkGreyExcluded: darkGrey can only be taken ONCE per run and is saved for a max-power (rainbow+aqua) play, so it must NEVER be recommended to complete a mission objective, even though it grants pulls/curses.

objectiveTypes.label: Gain time
objectiveTypes.note: Completes on its own — normal challenges grant time. No special beacon needed; do not push green for it.

objectiveTypes.label: Earn Reward Pulls
objectiveTypes.note: Purple grants pulls. darkGrey also would, but is excluded (once-per-run, saved for max power).

objectiveTypes.label: Open chests
objectiveTypes.note: Yellow spawns flying chests; Materialism adds 2/challenge. Environmental chests count too.

objectiveTypes.label: Get Boons
objectiveTypes.note: Blue is the direct boon source.

objectiveTypes.label: Get Curses
objectiveTypes.note: Purple grants curses (and pulls) — so purple advances both earn_pulls AND get_curses. darkGrey excluded.

objectiveTypes.label: Be offered N Beacons
objectiveTypes.note: Orange raises beacon choices; rerolls (pink/Gourmand) increase total beacons seen.

objectiveTypes.label: Complete challenges
objectiveTypes.note: Completes on its own by playing — any beacon that leads into a challenge advances it. No special beacon needed.

removedCandidate: kill_mobs — user confirms this is NOT an objective type (2026-07-23).

darkGreyStrategy.note: Not an objective concern, but recorded from the same feedback.
darkGreyStrategy.rule: darkGrey is once-per-run. Take it at MAX power (rainbow + aqua stacked). On an Opal Offering run, WAIT (bank boons first, since darkGrey's curses trigger Opal which consumes boons). Otherwise take it when offered at max power.
